spec.precondition: requires valid(nd) && !null(nd) && valid_range(nd->attached_processes, 0, 16) && (forall i in [0, 16): valid(&nd->attached_processes[i]) && valid_range(nd->attached_processes[i].memory_used, 0, 2))
spec.postcondition: (result < 0) || ((ensures (result == -1) || (result >= 0 && result < 16 && in_bounds(nd->attached_processes, result) && valid(&nd->attached_processes[result]) && in_bounds(nd->attached_processes[result].memory_used, 0) && in_bounds(nd->attached_processes[result].memory_used, 1) && nd->attached_processes[result].pid == task_tgid_nr(get_current()))) && ((result == -1 && (forall i in [0, 16): nd->attached_processes[i].pid != task_tgid_nr(get_current()))) || (result >= 0 && result < 16 && nd->attached_processes[result].pid == task_tgid_nr(get_current()) && (forall j in [0, result): nd->attached_processes[j].pid != task_tgid_nr(get_current())))))
